title: Appeal
description: docs/canonical/TZ-00-domain-event-canon.md, section 14.3. Owned by moderation-service (epd2_moderation_service.domain.Appeal). `reviewer_actor_id`/`result` are nullable until `decide_appeal` sets them. CT-00-06 (canon: an appeal must not be finally decided by the author of the original decision) is enforced at the application layer (`reviewer_actor_id != ModerationDecision.decided_by`), not structurally by this schema.
